overall_assessment.description: PASS = no high-confidence issues; MINOR_ISSUES = only medium/low severity; MAJOR_ISSUES = at least one high-confidence high/critical severity finding.

summary.description: One-paragraph summary (2-5 sentences) of what the PR does and the headline review conclusion. No bullet lists.

findings.description: Concrete, evidence-backed defects. Empty array when the diff is clean. Do NOT pad with low-confidence hunches.

file.description: Path of the affected file as it appears in the diff (repo-root-relative).

start_line.description: First line of the offending hunk in the NEW file (post-PR).

end_line.description: Last line of the offending hunk in the NEW file (post-PR). May equal start_line.

category.description: Defect category — first 7 are AI-generated-code specific patterns from arxiv 2512.05239 / 2601.19106.

confidence.description: How sure the reviewer is. Low-confidence findings are de-emphasized in the rendered output.

title.description: Short headline, < 80 chars, imperative or noun phrase.

description.description: 2-4 sentences explaining what the defect is, why it matters, and the realistic scenario it triggers under.

evidence.description: The exact code snippet (1-10 lines) from the diff that demonstrates the issue. Verbatim, no paraphrasing.

suggested_fix.description: Optional concrete fix sketch (code, not prose). Omit if no obvious fix.
